package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerProfilingBenchmarkingPprofEndpointEnabledWithoutSamplingPlan() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_pprof_endpoint_enabled_without_sampling_plan"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag always-on profiling endpoints in production services without access or sampling controls."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
